subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, that there is none other God but He, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and calleth the peoples unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق بانه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و  یدعوا  الناس الی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
